I agree that the dorsal respiratory group plays a primary role in initiating and maintaining the fundamental breath patterns. However, it’s worth noting that recent research suggests some overlap; certain ventral respiratory neurons also contribute to this process by influencing the timing and depth of inspiration. Nevertheless, they do so under the broader control of the dorsal respiratory group.
